title: Peek-a-Boo with Lily
synopsis: Baby Lily plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the day, discovering each person hiding behind colorful blankets with delightful surprise and joy.

illustration.description: Baby Lily with curly dark hair and bright brown eyes sits on a soft cream carpet, reaching toward a bright yellow blanket. Her chubby hands are outstretched with excitement. The room has warm peach walls and soft morning sunlight streaming through a window.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily reaching for yellow blanket to find Mama

illustration.description: Mama, a woman with warm brown skin and long black braids, peeks out from behind the yellow blanket with a huge smile. Baby Lily claps her hands in delight, her face beaming with joy. Soft pastel colors fill the cozy living room scene.
illustration.alt: Mama appearing from behind yellow blanket while baby Lily claps happily

illustration.description: Baby Lily crawls toward a fluffy blue blanket near the kitchen doorway. Her diaper crinkles as she moves, and her eyes sparkle with anticipation. The kitchen background shows soft mint green cabinets and warm wooden floors.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily crawling toward blue blanket to find Papa

illustration.description: Papa, a tall man with gentle eyes and short curly hair, emerges from behind the blue blanket with his arms outstretched for tickles. Baby Lily squeals with laughter, her tiny feet kicking with excitement. The scene radiates warmth and playfulness.
illustration.alt: Papa appearing from blue blanket ready to tickle giggling baby Lily

illustration.description: Baby Lily toddles toward a soft pink blanket in the sunny garden. Colorful flowers bloom in the background with butterflies dancing nearby. Lily's chubby legs carry her forward with determination, arms outstretched toward the mysterious blanket.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily walking toward pink blanket in garden to find Grandma

illustration.description: Grandma, an elderly woman with silver hair in a gentle bun and kind wrinkled eyes, appears from behind the pink blanket with arms wide open. Baby Lily reaches up for kisses, both faces glowing with pure love and happiness in the flower-filled garden.
illustration.alt: Grandma emerging from pink blanket for kisses with baby Lily in garden

illustration.description: Baby Lily looks around the playroom filled with colorful toys and blocks. A bright green blanket hides someone near the toy chest. Lily's eyes are wide with wonder, and she claps her hands together in anticipation of finding her brother.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily searching for Big Brother behind green blanket in playroom

illustration.description: A young boy with the same curly dark hair as Lily pops out from behind the green blanket with a big grin. Baby Lily waddles into his waiting arms for a gentle hug. The playroom scene shows scattered toys and warm afternoon light creating a cozy family moment.
illustration.alt: Big Brother appearing from green blanket to hug baby Lily in playroom

illustration.description: Baby Lily sits in the center surrounded by her whole family - Mama, Papa, Grandma, and Big Brother - all holding their colorful blankets and smiling lovingly at her. The scene glows with warm golden light, showing the complete circle of family love and togetherness.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily surrounded by whole family with their peek-a-boo blankets

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color blanket does Mama hide behind?
questions.explanation: Mama hides behind the bright yellow blanket when playing peek-a-boo with Lily.

questions.question: Where does Grandma play peek-a-boo?
questions.explanation: Grandma plays peek-a-boo with Lily in the sunny garden with flowers and butterflies.

questions.question: What does Big Brother do when he appears?
questions.explanation: Big Brother gives Lily gentle hugs when he comes out from behind his green blanket.
